title: Wall Street digests record fundraising haul as AI race intensifies
description: SpaceX, Anthropic and Alphabet financings highlight investors’ willingness to absorb a torrent of new issuance

title: Bridgepoint weighs $1bn sale of anti-drone group guarding World Cup sites
description: Danish company MyDefence has already drawn buyout and defence sector interest as demand surges for counter-UAV kit

title: Germany seeks Deutsche Börse exemption from EU supervision
description: Stock exchange would have option to remain under domestic authority as part of new EU markets regime

title: China tees up digital payments system to compete with dollar
description: Beijing’s cross-border currency platform will be backed by central banks of Hong Kong, Thailand, UAE and Saudi Arabia

title: Mongolia Reaffirms One China Policy at Meeting, China Says
description: Mongolian President Khurelsukh Ukhnaa said Mongolia firmly adheres to the One China principle in a meeting with China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Ulaanbaatar on June 13, according to a statement from China’s Foreign Ministry.

title: South Korea’s World-Beating Stock Market Eyes Its MSCI Moment
description: After one of its most volatile weeks in years, South Korea’s stock market is approaching a milestone it has long been chasing: a potential path into MSCI Inc.’s developed-market status.

title: Nigerian author accuses hospital of stalling review into her son's death
description: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie's 21-month old son died in a Lagos hospital, which she says is trying to stop an inquest into the circumstances of his death.

title: Japan Is Running Out of Royals. Are More Men the Answer?
description: Japan’s legislature is drafting a plan to allow the imperial family to adopt distant male relatives. But some in Japan would prefer a female emperor.

title: Germany and Japan Are Rearming Again, 80 Years After World War II
description: After becoming allies to disastrous effect in the 1940s, Berlin and Tokyo are finding new reasons to team up — including rebuilding their militaries.

title: In Venezuela, a 91-Year-Old Weaver Sticks to Traditions
description: Though electric machines are now standard, the Venezuelan weaver Margarita Mora has clung to a mix of ancestral Indigenous and Spanish practices to create surprisingly modern work.

title: Knicks clinch first NBA title in 53 years, as Brunson shines against Spurs
description: The New York Knicks ended their championship drought on Saturday, winning the best-of-seven NBA Finals series 4-1.

title: ‘Lion of Mesopotamia’: How Aymen Hussein beat tragedy to reach World Cup
description: Iraq’s ‘most expensive footballer’, striker who scored Iraq’s qualifying goal against Bolivia, retraces his journey.

title: Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 to mark a winning return to the World Cup
description: John McGinn's deflected goal gives the Scots a World Cup win for the first time since 1990.

title: Two killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
description: An Israeli strike on southern Gaza has killed two people and injured another, according to Palestinian authorities.

title: After battling armed attacks, Mauritania attempts to revive tourism
description: Armed groups linked to al-Qaeda began attacks in the mid-2000s, but several security measures have halted them.

title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
description: Gold has been under pressure since the US and Israel launched a war against Iran in late February.

title: Vinicius drags low-key Brazil level against dominant Morocco at World Cup
description: Vinicius Jr individual effort lift Brazil's struggle in team's 2026 tournament opener against Africa champions Morocco.

title: America250 versus Freedom 250: What to know about the US semiquincentennial
description: The celebrations to mark the US's 250th anniversary have been overshadowed by questions about Trump's influence.

title: Haiti fans in the streets, Scotland faithful in kilts
description: It’s expected to be a spicy encounter: Haiti supporters and Scotland’s Tartan Army celebrate World Cup matchup.

title: Iran war live: Trump says deal to be signed today; Tehran disputes timing
description: US and Iran appear close to signing the first stage of a peace deal, the two sides differ on when it will be signed.

title: China’s AI ‘hundred model’ war shifts to enterprise value, JPMorgan says
description: The drive for AI monetisation among Chinese tech companies has become a battle over “delivering measurable business value” rather than raw technical performance, according to Alex Yao, head of China equity research at JPMorgan. China’s AI landscape was rapidly consolidating from a fragmented “hundred-model” battle down to a smaller group of globally competitive leading players, particularly those that could transform consumer-facing features into reliable enterprise-grade infrastructure, Yao...

title: Natural diamond firms turn to blockchain traceability amid lab-grown competition
description: Hit by competition from lab-grown diamonds and declines in pricing, the natural diamond industry is launching a large-scale traceability system to further build customer trust and establish provenance of the consumer jewels, in a move that industry observers say will boost sales. De Beers Group, the world’s largest diamond producer and distributor, recently announced that the Gemological Institute of America (GIA) will acquire a 30 per cent stake in Tracr, a De Beers-backed firm that has...

title: China’s Geely Auto to slash excess capacity amid overhaul to boost carmaker’s global edge
description: Geely Auto, which is locked in a fierce battle for dominance against BYD in China’s crowded automotive market, has pledged to purge excess capacity through an asset restructuring while ramping up its go-global drive with an eye on greater international competitiveness. Chairman Li Shufu said during the Chongqing Auto Show on Friday that the Hong Kong-listed carmaker would assess the oversupply of capacity across all units to determine whether to close, suspend, merge or sell redundant production...

title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
description: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
description: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

title: My plumber charged $160 to fix the cistern on my toilet — but created another problem. Do I pay again?
description: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”

title: ‘I feel like he may be taking advantage of us’: Our adviser pushes annuities after we already said no. Do we fire him?
description: “I feel like he may be taking advantage of us.”
